response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development but lacks the mandatory C++ development on Windows platform, SQL experience with SQL Server/Oracle, and financial domain expertise (fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking). While they have some relevant skills (e.g., C/C++ for NI LabWindows/CVI), they do not meet the core technical or domain requirements for this role.
strengths: Strong software engineering background with experience in multiple languages and paradigms
Proven ability to work in diverse domains (embedded systems, web, mobile, and AI)
Demonstrated expertise in optimization and system design (e.g., low-latency apps, pricing strategies)
concerns: No direct experience with C++ on Windows platform required for the role
No SQL Server or Oracle experience mentioned
Lacks domain expertise in fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking
